headline: BofA Lowers McKesson (MCK) Price Target, Flags GLP-1 Pricing Pressure
summary: McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 6, BofA analyst Allen Lutz lowered the firm’s price recommendation on McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) to $1,000 from $1,040. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The analyst said the rapid decline in cash-pay GLP-1 prices is […]

headline: Will McKesson (MCK) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: McKesson (MCK) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
